# Sea Life Planet

> Sea Life Planet is a marine-biology-backed guide to fishkeeping, covering species profiles, tank setup, water chemistry, and equipment reviews for freshwater and saltwater aquarists.

Content is written and reviewed by our team of aquarists (see /about/). Guides are updated periodically to reflect current best practice.

## Key sections

- [Saltwater Fishkeeping](https://sealifeplanet.com/saltwater/): Species profiles and care guides for marine aquariums.
- [Freshwater Fish](https://sealifeplanet.com/freshwater-fish/): Species profiles and care guides for freshwater aquariums.
- [Product Reviews](https://sealifeplanet.com/product-reviews/): Independent reviews of aquarium equipment.
- [All Fish Species Guides](https://sealifeplanet.com/fish-types/): Full index of species profiles.
- [About](https://sealifeplanet.com/about/): Who we are and our editorial standards.

## Notes

- Some links to equipment are Amazon affiliate links (see /affiliate-disclosure/). This does not influence our recommendations.
- Full sitemap: https://sealifeplanet.com/sitemap.xml
